text.title: Service Bootstrap Checklist Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Alerts wired but no dashboard; on-call wakes at 03:00 with no context.
antipattern.fix: Reverse order; require dashboard link before alert PR merges.

antipattern.symptom: Item owner left the company 6 months ago; nobody fixes the broken healthcheck.
antipattern.root-cause: named-owner not refreshed on personnel change.
antipattern.fix: Quarterly review; rotate owners on departure.

antipattern.symptom: Service took traffic with only 7/12 items done; first incident took 4h to diagnose.
antipattern.fix: Block traffic at platform gate (LB config); require record signed-off.
